// 這是 RISC-V 的機器碼測試檔
// 配合 Bootloader 的行為，採用 MSB first 的方式排列 Bytes

@00000
// 0x00000000: 0x00100093 (addi x1, x0, 1)
00 10 00 93

// 0x00000004: 0x00A02113 (slti x2, x0, 10)
00 A0 21 13

// 0x00000008: 0x00F03193 (sltiu x3, x0, 15)
00 F0 31 93

// 0x0000000C: 0x00F0C213 (xori x4, x1, 15)
00 F0 C2 13

// 0x00000010: 0x00716293 (ori x5, x2, 7)
00 71 62 93

// 0x00000014: 0x0031F313 (andi x6, x3, 3)
00 31 F3 13

// 0x00000018: 0x00221393 (slli x7, x4, 2)
00 22 13 93

// 0x0000001C: 0x0012D413 (srli x8, x5, 1)
00 12 D4 13

// 0x00000020: 0x40125493 (srai x9, x4, 1)
40 12 54 93

// 0x00000024: 0x00208633 (add x12, x1, x2)
00 20 86 33

// 0x00000028: 0x404186B3 (sub x13, x3, x4)
40 41 86 B3

// 0x0000002C: 0x00B52733 (slt x14, x10, x11)
00 B5 27 33

// 0x00000030: 0x007437B3 (sltu x15, x8, x7)
00 74 37 B3

// 0x00000034: 0x0045F833 (and x16, x11, x4)
00 45 F8 33

// 0x00000038: 0x00C5E8B3 (or x17, x11, x12)
00 C5 E8 B3

// 0x0000003C: 0x00E6C933 (xor x18, x13, x14)
00 E6 C9 33

// 0x00000040: 0x001799B3 (sll x19, x15, x1)
00 17 99 B3

// 0x00000044: 0x00285A33 (srl x20, x16, x2)
00 28 5A 33

// 0x00000048: 0x4038DAB3 (sra x21, x17, x3)
40 38 DA B3

// 0x0000004C: 0x00208463 (beq x1, x2, 8)
00 20 84 63

// 0x00000050: 0x00000B13 (addi x22, x0, 0)
00 00 0B 13

// 0x00000054: 0x00100B13 (addi x22, x0, 1)
00 10 0B 13

// 0x00000058: 0x00419463 (bne x3, x4, 8)
00 41 94 63

// 0x0000005C: 0x00000B93 (addi x23, x0, 0)
00 00 0B 93

// 0x00000060: 0x00100B93 (addi x23, x0, 1)
00 10 0B 93

// 0x00000064: 0x0062C463 (blt x5, x6, 8)
00 62 C4 63

// 0x00000068: 0x00000C13 (addi x24, x0, 0)
00 00 0C 13

// 0x0000006C: 0x00100C13 (addi x24, x0, 1)
00 10 0C 13

// 0x00000070: 0x0083D463 (bge x7, x8, 8)
00 83 D4 63

// 0x00000074: 0x00000C93 (addi x25, x0, 0)
00 00 0C 93

// 0x00000078: 0x00100C93 (addi x25, x0, 1)
00 10 0C 93

// 0x0000007C: 0x00A4E463 (bltu x9, x10, 8)
00 A4 E4 63

// 0x00000080: 0x00000D13 (addi x26, x0, 0)
00 00 0D 13

// 0x00000084: 0x00100D13 (addi x26, x0, 1)
00 10 0D 13

// 0x00000088: 0x00C5F463 (bgeu x11, x12, 8)
00 C5 F4 63

// 0x0000008C: 0x00000D93 (addi x27, x0, 0)
00 00 0D 93

// 0x00000090: 0x00100D93 (addi x27, x0, 1)
00 10 0D 93

// 0x00000094: 0x06000E6F (jal x28, 96)
06 00 0E 6F

// 0x00000098: 0x00730EB3 (add x29, x6, x7)
00 73 0E B3

// 0x0000009C: 0x12345537 (lui x10, 74565)
12 34 55 37

// 0x000000A0: 0x20000597 (auipc x11, 131072)
20 00 05 97

// 0x000000A4: 0x00D00023 (sb x13, 0(x0))
00 D0 00 23

// 0x000000A8: 0x00D010A3 (sh x13, 1(x0))
00 D0 10 A3

// 0x000000AC: 0x00D02123 (sw x13, 2(x0))
00 D0 21 23

// 0x000000B0: 0x00002083 (lw x1, 0(x0))
00 00 20 83

// 0x000000B4: 0x00202103 (lw x2, 2(x0))
00 20 21 03

// 0x000000B8: 0x00101183 (lh x3, 1(x0))
00 10 11 83

// 0x000000BC: 0x00105203 (lhu x4, 1(x0))
00 10 52 03

// 0x000000C0: 0x00205283 (lhu x5, 2(x0))
00 20 52 83

// 0x000000C4: 0x00300303 (lb x6, 3(x0))
00 30 03 03

// 0x000000C8: 0x00304383 (lbu x7, 3(x0))
00 30 43 83

// 0x000000CC: 0x00504403 (lbu x8, 5(x0))
00 50 44 03

// 0x000000D0: 0x02B504B3 (mul x9, x10, x11)
02 B5 04 B3

// 0x000000D4: 0x02531633 (mulh x12, x6, x5)
02 53 16 33

// 0x000000D8: 0x025327B3 (mulhsu x15, x6, x5)
02 53 27 B3

// 0x000000DC: 0x02533933 (mulhu x18, x6, x5)
02 53 39 33

// 0x000000E0: 0x02534AB3 (div x21, x6, x5)
02 53 4A B3

// 0x000000E4: 0x02535C33 (divu x24, x6, x5)
02 53 5C 33

// 0x000000E8: 0x02536DB3 (rem x27, x6, x5)
02 53 6D B3

// 0x000000EC: 0x02537F33 (remu x30, x6, x5)
02 53 7F 33

// 0x000000F0: 0x00C0006F (jal x0, 12)
00 C0 00 6F

// 0x000000F4: 0x00100213 (addi x4, x0, 1)
00 10 02 13

// 0x000000F8: 0x000E0267 (jalr x4, x28, 0)
00 0E 02 67

// 0x000000FC: 0x00000013 (addi x0, x0, 0)
00 00 00 13
